channel.title: The Answer Engine — AI News
channel.description: AI news, read the way machines read it. Sydney. Curated daily by AISearch Global.

item.title: The Answer Engine — 24 July 2026
item.description: 12 stories: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack scale system · Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models · AegisAI, founded by former Google security execs, lands $36M to stop AI-driven spear phishing · The Download: energy transmission and US threats against Chinese AI · How AI helps scientists design the next generation of medicines · BatchDAG: LLM-Planned Execution Graphs for Scalable Ad-Hoc Analysis Over Enterprise Data · AI Search is Working. How to Prove It With Real Tests. via @sejournal, @hethr_campbell · AI Browsers Are Backward Because Agents Never Needed The Visual Layer via @sejournal, @slobodanmanic · Pichai Says Google Needs Gemini 4 To Compete At The Frontier via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern · In Pictures: iTnews State of Data & AI Launch Sydney · Scaling innovation safely: innovating through rapid prototyping with the mission in mind · State of Data & AI 2026: Agentic AI

item.title: The Answer Engine — 23 July 2026
item.description: 12 stories: Treasury threatens sanctions after White House claims Moonshot distilled Anthropic’s Fable · How OpenAI’s human mistake led to the AI-powered hack on Hugging Face · Travis Kalanick’s robotics company raises $1.7B, led by a16z · The Download: NASA’s new space telescope and OpenAI’s autonomous hacker · SysAdmin: Measuring Instrumental Power-Seeking in Frontier AI · Calibrated Selective Fact-Checking via Evidence Chain Evaluation · Why AI Content Stopped Working & What To Do About It [Watch Now] via @sejournal, @hethr_campbell · Beyond Brand Sovereignty: How To Build An AI-Ready Source Of Truth via @sejournal, @billhunt · AI Overviews Now Answer Most Local Searches – How To Get Your Business Cited via @sejournal, @AdamHeitzman · Western Sydney University gives M365 Copilot to all staff · OpenAI models running benchmark breached AI platform Hugging Face · How the Fair Work Commission safely deployed Agentic AI in weeks, not years

item.title: The Answer Engine — 22 July 2026
item.description: 12 stories: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its own pre-release models · Jack Dorsey is taking on Slack with Buzz, a group chat platform for teams and their AI agents · AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app · The Download: Chinese AI divides the White House, and a record copyright payout · Advancing next-gen AI with materials science innovation · Rater State Bias in RLHF Preference Data: An Audit Framework · Google’s AI Search Data Is Growing, But The Gaps Remain via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern · The New Google Business Profile Playbook for AI Local Search via @sejournal, @CallRail · 2027 Marketing Budgets: Why New Categories Beat Bigger AI Line Items via @sejournal, @gregjarboe · CommBank iQ is putting AI to work on its core dataset · State of Data & AI 2026 · State of Data & AI 2026: Data Sovereignty & Compliance

item.title: The Answer Engine — 21 July 2026
item.description: 10 stories: AI’s most important protocol is getting a little bit easier to use · OpenAI is scared of open-weight models. Should the US be? · Natural raises $30M to reinvent payments for AI agents — and take on Stripe · China’s AI models have Trump’s AI world at war with itself · The Download: AI hiring biases, and weather data sabotage · AI is more likely than humans to form biases when hiring · Google Must Share Anonymized Search Data With Rivals via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern · AI Answers About Your Locations Are Often Wrong – Check Before Customers Do via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern · MCP For Marketers: What To Connect First & Why Your Data Wins · Vic Labor moots workplace AI and biometrics surveillance curbs

item.title: The Answer Engine — 20 July 2026
item.description: 10 stories: Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans? · TechCrunch Mobility: The battle over robotaxi rules · ‘Odyssey’ director Christopher Nolan calls AI an obvious ‘Trojan horse’ · The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action · GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness · How to manage AI investments in the agentic era · How To Measure AI Search Visibility via @sejournal, @slobodanmanic · Google’s AI Mode Now Connects To Your Apps via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern · Google Is Using Social Media Signals To Mask AI Search Click Loss via @sejournal, @TaylorDanRW · Flight Centre to embrace AI agents, ecommerce consolidation

item.title: The Answer Engine — 19 July 2026
item.description: 9 stories: Kimi: Threat or menace? · Neil Rimer thinks the AI money is coming back out · Vertu wants executives to pay $6,880 for an AI agent — here’s how it actually performs · A scorecard for the AI age · Why teens deserve access to safe AI · How Cars24 scales conversations and builds faster with OpenAI · Google NotebookLM Rebrand May Expose Your Site To More AI Scraping via @sejournal, @martinibuster · Google Puts A Number On AI Search Clicks, Without The Data via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern · Google Delays Gemini 3.5 Pro Over Coding Issues: Report via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern

item.title: The Answer Engine — 18 July 2026
item.description: 9 stories: AI-driven memory crunch jolts India’s smartphone market · How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans · Patreon stops asking AI bots not to scrape — and starts blocking them · The Download: perimenopause misinformation and China’s latest AI leap · Interventional Grounding Audits: Black-Box Premise-Dependency Tests for LLM Chain-of-Thought via Predicate Substitution · Probabilistic Extension of Neuro-Symbolic AGI Robots based on Belnap's Typed Intensional FOL · Google Faces Class Action Over Books Used To Train Gemini via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern · Gemini 3.5 Pro Delayed Over Coding, Bloomberg Reports via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern · AI Search Cites Reddit: 5 Proven Plays To Boost Multi-Location Visibility via @sejournal, @lorenbaker

item.title: The Answer Engine — 17 July 2026
item.description: 10 stories: Founders Fund hires former OpenAI exec Ryan Beiermeister (and not because of her ‘Mafia’ skills) · Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos · Newsletter platform Beehiiv now lets subscribers chat with each other, adds AI · The Download: OpenAI unveils GPT-Red and heat pumps rise in the US · OriginBlame: Record- and Token-Level Data Provenance for AI Training Datasets · SPINE: Bridging the Cyber-Physical Gap with Agentic AI · Google Starts Rolling Out Connected Apps In AI Mode Search via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern · Do The Answer Engines Keep Your Fingerprint, Or Do They Start Fresh Every Time? via @sejournal, @DuaneForrester · AI SEO: Writing That’s Specific May Get Cited More via @sejournal, @martinibuster · Colonial First State names data and AI group executive

item.title: The Answer Engine — 16 July 2026
item.description: 10 stories: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex · Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling · Hack suggests AI music generator Suno scraped YouTube for training data · Meet GPT-Red: an LLM super-hacker OpenAI built to make its models safer · Faithful, Not Corrective: Message-Format Effects in Multi-Hop Agent Relays Are Tier-Dependent · Boltzmann MapReduce: A Partition-Function Reduce for Forkable Sandboxes · ChatGPT Calls Turn Into Leads More Often: Invoca Report via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern · GA4’s AI Assistant Channel Undercounts Your AI Traffic: How To Build One That Doesn’t · Google Revamps Image Search, Adds Generation To AI Overviews via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern · Alinta Energy spins up AI system for executive insights

item.title: The Answer Engine — 15 July 2026
item.description: 12 stories: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta · Anthropic’s newest ad is creeping people out · The founder of Hinge raised $18M to build a new AI dating service, Overtone · The Download: Claude’s inner workings, and the future of world models · From ML Predictions to Informed Diagnostic Assistance Using the Toulmin Model of Argumentation · Format Sensitivity Index: Token-Controlled Prompt Wrapper Robustness and Schema Compliance in LLM Benchmarking · Google Adds Image Generation To AI Overviews, Revamps Images via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern · Scaled AI Content Often Fails & Google’s Crawl Economics Explain Why via @sejournal, @TaylorDanRW · Surviving The Impression Squeeze: How Agentic Commerce Is Changing Google Ads In 2026 via @sejournal, @siliconvallaeys · IBM warns AI boom squeezing software budgets · Australia to establish government AI office · AI agents are becoming the enterprise's most privileged users. And most organisations don't know it yet

item.title: The Answer Engine — 14 July 2026
item.description: 11 stories: Satya Nadella has issued a shocking warning to companies using AI · Apple says former employee exploited ‘rare’ bug to download confidential files after leaving for OpenAI · The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI · What Anthropic’s latest AI discovery does—and doesn’t—show · The Download: a donor conception cap and world models for AI · Interval Certifications for Multilayered Perceptrons via Lattice Traversal · Google’s Marvin Clarifies AI Search and Qualified Future Conversions via @sejournal, @brookeosmundson · ChatGPT Access Tied To 9% Drop In Traditional Search via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern · Google Ads Requires Disclosure For AI-Generated Content via @sejournal, @brookeosmundson · State of Security 2026: Application Security · How Monash University is tackling the AI-driven app security gap

item.title: The Answer Engine — 13 July 2026
item.description: 9 stories: TechCrunch Mobility: A robotaxi ultimatum · Reed Jobs would rather talk about curing cancer than his last name · Claude Code costs up to $200 a month. Goose does the same thing for free. · How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI · GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot · GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition · The WebMCP Tools You Expose To Agents Can Be Used To Hijack Them via @sejournal, @slobodanmanic · Apple sues OpenAI, two former employees · Meta scraps AI image feature days after launch

item.title: The Answer Engine — 12 July 2026
item.description: 8 stories: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households · Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash · OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter · Context Graphs for Proactive Enterprise Agents · AI-integrated models for assessing agricultural resilience · Adversarial Social Epistemology for Assemblies of Humans and Large Language Models · AI Visibility Rankings Aren’t Stable – New Research Shows It’s Mostly Statistical Noise via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern · Google’s AI Citation Model Is Not Free Forever: What CMOs Need To Prepare For Now via @sejournal, @gregjarboe

item.title: The Answer Engine — 11 July 2026
item.description: 9 stories: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft · SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs · Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI · The Download: Claude’s inner workings and OpenAI’s “super app” · LLM-powered reasoning in agent-based modeling · QANTIS: Hardware-Calibrated Sequential POMDP Belief Updates on IBM Heron · Free AI Citations Won’t Last. I’ve Watched Google Fence Off A Wide Open Field Before via @sejournal, @gregjarboe · The Agentic Web Is Splitting Into Two Bets: Identity And Capability via @sejournal, @slobodanmanic · How deeper discovery improves customer business outcomes

item.title: The Answer Engine — 10 July 2026
item.description: 12 stories: Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1 · New York Times says OpenAI hid evidence in ChatGPT copyright trial · Google will now disclose which ads are made with AI · Anthropic found a hidden space where Claude puzzles over concepts · AgentLens: Production-Assessed Trajectory Reviews for Coding Agent Evaluation · When Does In-Context Search Help? A Sampling-Complexity Theory of Reflection-Driven Reasoning · The Web Is Eating Itself And Your Metrics Look Fine via @sejournal, @DuaneForrester · AI Search Is Exposing SEO’s Risk Of Losing Ownership Of GEO Outcomes via @sejournal, @martinibuster · 62% Of AI Brand Recommendations Vanish After One Buyer Question – New Data via @sejournal, @gregjarboe · CBA to take AI orchestration agent beyond its retail bank · City of Moreton Bay to trial object detection and AI for traffic flow · ANZ to trial Swift's blockchain ledger

item.title: The Answer Engine — 9 July 2026
item.description: 9 stories: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet · Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise. · OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations · CSTutorBench: Benchmarking Small Language Models as Tutors for Block-Based Programming · Foundation Models for Automatic CAD Generation · Narrative World Model: Narratology-Grounded Writer Memory for Long-Form Fiction · An Easy Digital PR Strategy For AI SEO via @sejournal, @martinibuster · You Can’t See How AI Ranks You, So Build What It Can Read via @sejournal, @slobodanmanic · How To Build A Performance Marketing Experimentation Framework With AI

item.title: The Answer Engine — 8 July 2026
item.description: 9 stories: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’ · This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment · Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool · EmTech AI 2026: The Rise of the AI Platform · Prompt-to-Paper: Agentic AI System for Bioinformatics · From Graphs to Gradients: Physics-Inspired Structural Attribution for Cyber-Physical IoT Systems and Beyond · How SEO Teams Stopped Guessing Which AI Search Strategies Paid Off via @sejournal, @lorenbaker · OpenAI GPT-Live Brings Search Into ChatGPT Voice via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern · Reclaiming Brand Sovereignty In The AI Era via @sejournal, @billhunt

item.title: The Answer Engine — 7 July 2026
item.description: 10 stories: Meta rolls out Muse, a new AI image generator · Why the rise of open source AI isn’t hurting Anthropic … yet · Microsoft joins AI cost-cutting trend by relying more on its own models · The Download: your stake in OpenAI, and the Treasury’s AI warning · The foundational elements of AI architecture that IT leaders need to scale · iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni Technical Report · AI Search: Is Your Content Strategy Accidentally Recommending Your Competitors? · SEO Study: 5 Lessons From Running AI Agents Across Every Search via @sejournal, @lorenbaker · Local Marketing Is Too Complex: What the Data Says & What To Do · Bendigo Bank scoping more than 3000 ideas for AI use

item.title: The Answer Engine — 6 July 2026
item.description: 8 stories: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom · Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales · Reddit is using LLMs to solve a problem LLMs largely created · Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity · HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI · Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model · Google AI Overviews Study Finds Lost Clicks Weren’t Lower Quality via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern · OpenAI Hiring Points To Image & Video Ads Coming To ChatGPT via @sejournal, @MattGSouthern

item.title: The Answer Engine — 5 July 2026
item.description: 12 stories: Almost 90 new unicorns have been minted so far this year — here they are · Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think. · Railway secures $100 million to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure · Claude Science is Anthropic’s newest flagship product · How ChatGPT adoption has expanded · Inside Genebench-Pro · Safari’s New MCP Server Enables AI Debugging For SEO And CWV via @sejournal, @martinibuster · Google Put AI Visibility Inside The SEO Tool On Purpose via @sejournal, @slobodanmanic · Should I Block AI Crawlers Or Measure Their Value First? – Ask An SEO via @sejournal, @HelenPollitt1 · Attorney-General's Dept backs Copilot Chat, Google NotebookLM · AWS to create division of 'embedded' AI engineers · Vocus to invest $500 million in new fibre builds
